[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: Meghan Markle Wore An Elegant Black Dress to the Festival of Remembrance 2019
[METADATA/INTRO]: Meghan Markle and her husband Prince Harry joined Queen Elizabeth, Prince Charles, and many other members of the royal family today for a somber event memorializing fallen soldiers. The Royal Festival of Remembrance, held annually at the Royal Albert Hall,...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: To commemorate those lost, Meghan wore an understated yet elegant black fit and flare dress with a subtle brocade. Button details at the front and a scooped V-neck lapel added a vintage-esque touch which she matched with demure accessories; slingback heels, a black leather clutch, and gold hoop earrings. 
 Meghan accented the look with a red poppy pin, a century-old tradition in Britain and some of the Commonwealth countries, on her left shoulder. Though the flower, a symbol commemorating lost soldiers, is traditionally worn on the left for men, there's some debate about whether it should be worn on the right for women. However Meghan seems to have taken a cue from the Queen herself, as well as her sister-in-law Kate Middleton, and chosen to sport the poppy on the left.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2020-01-07
[TITLE]: Meghan Markle returns to royal duties rocking a Reiss coat, a chic satin skirt and berry-stained lips
[METADATA/INTRO]: We can't believe we haven't seen the Duke and Duchess of Sussex for six long weeks! But the royal couple returned to work on Tuesday as they headed to Canada House in London. Meghan, 38, looked as stylish and glowing...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: We last saw the former Suits actress back in November at the Festival of Remembrance held at the Royal Albert Hall. The US-born royal delighted onlookers in a black jacquard fit-and-flare dress with a deep neckline and a belt around the waist. 
 Meghan at the Festival of Remembrance in November 
 She teamed the frock with a pair of black Aquazurra 'Deneuve' suede pumps and a pretty pair of ruby heart earrings from Jessica McCormack. Deciding to wear her long hair up, she rocked a sleek bun and her flawless complexion looked fresh and youthful. 
 MORE: New Year gym kit inspiration from Kate Middleton, Sophie Wessex, Meghan Markle and co

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2019-11-09
[TITLE]: Meghan Markle's Black Dress at the Festival of Remembrance | PS Fashion
[METADATA/INTRO]: Meghan Markle Chose a Black Brocade Dress For the Royal Family's Important Outing On Saturday, the royal family reunited publicly for the first time in months to attend the Royal British Legion's Festival of Remembrance at the Royal Albert Hall....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Meghan Markle Chose a Black Brocade Dress For the Royal Family's Important Outing 
 On Saturday, the royal family reunited publicly for the first time in months to attend the Royal British Legion's Festival of Remembrance at the Royal Albert Hall. Prince William, Kate Middleton, Prince Harry, and Meghan Markle joined Queen Elizabeth II for a somber evening of reflection before Remembrance Sunday, which honors military members who died in war. 
 This is Meghan's second round of remembrance events since becoming a royal last year. She chose a sophisticated black brocade dress by Erdem for the occasion. Erdem appears to be a favorite designer for Meghan, as well as for her sister-in-law, Kate. Meghan's retro pick featured an A-line skirt that hit right above her knee, a belted waist, and buttons down the front. The Duchess of Sussex completed the look with a trusty pair of Jessica McCormack hoop earrings, her Aquazzura pumps, and the traditional red poppy pin. Ahead, see more photos of her full outfit.
